basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has released the official Research Associate - III Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the AIIMS Delhi Research Associate - III Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with an MD, MS, or MDS qualification can apply online from now until 15-06-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India guidelines.

qualification.details: Research Associate - III: MD / MS / MDS from NMC / NDC recognized medical / dental college with experience in conducting systematic reviews and meta-analysis as demonstrated by certified training and at least 02 published systematic reviews as the first or corresponding author in MEDLINE indexed journals.

salary_details.details: Research Associate - III: Rs. 67,000 + Rs. 20,100 HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Research Associate - III Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Research Associate - III Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Research Associate - III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Research Associate - III post is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate - III position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MD / MS / MDS degree from an NMC / NDC recognized medical / dental college, along with specific experience in systematic reviews and meta-analysis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate - III post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate - III position is 35 years, with age relaxation applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate - III role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 67,000 plus Rs. 20,100 HRA per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate - III post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Associate - III position at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Research Associate - III recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate - III position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a personal discussion or interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does AIIMS Delhi offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India guidelines for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for the Research Associate - III post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Official Notification PDF" link provided in the Important Links section of this article.
